name: Glass Elbow Adapter w/ Glass Screen
summary: Glass Elbow Adapter w/ Glass Screen — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: This Glass Elbow Adapter with Glass Screen is perfect for those seeking to enhance the vapour path on their Arizer XQ2, Extreme Q, or V-Tower vaporiser. The included glass elbow adapter necessitates the use of a screen, which can alter vapour flavour or become dislodged. This glass adapter eliminates both concerns with its durable and flavorful design. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
